text:
There was a little girl named Clara who lived on an island. She loved to sail. One day she sailed too close to an enormous dragon.

Clara screamed. The dragon turned.

She cried. The dragon didn't.

She ran. The dragon flew after her.

She climbed a tree. The dragon climbed after that.

She waved. The dragon just sat there.

Finally, she jumped down.

She ran as fast as she could.

She couldn't breathe!

She fell...

Into a sea of feathers.

She was dreaming.

A wise old owl.

Oh! You knew?

You just flew by my nest!

That's okay.

You have my feathers.

You look amazing.

I always listen.

Just don't talk.

No promises.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
